meeting.label: Meeting board
meeting.blurb: Discussion sorted into topic / to-do / decision / risk columns

orgchart.label: Org chart
orgchart.blurb: Departments, roles and reporting lines as a tree

flow.label: Flowchart
flow.blurb: Steps chained into a left-to-right flow

mindmap.label: Mind map
mindmap.blurb: Brainstorm radiating from a central topic

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.blurb: Events and milestones in time order

gantt.label: Gantt / Schedule
gantt.blurb: Task schedule — one row per owner, time runs left to right

record.title: Just talk
record.body: Press this to start recording the meeting: speak normally, pause for a beat, and the AI turns that chunk into sticky notes on the board. You can also give commands while recording, like "tidy this up" or "assign this one to Sam".

paste.title: Already have a transcript?
paste.body: Expand "paste a transcript" in this panel, paste your text and hand it to the AI — it builds out the board the same way.

toolstrip.title: Manual tools
toolstrip.body: Sticky notes, annotations, new diagrams, connectors, auto-arrange and undo all live here. You can also double-click any empty spot to add a sticky.

share.title: Bring people in
share.body: Share / QR: teammates scan the QR code or type the room code and edit with you in real time — nothing to install.

export.title: Wrap up
export.body: Export: an AI-written one-page summary matched to each diagram type, or Markdown / PNG / a fully restorable board file.

help.title: Always within reach
help.body: Reopen the guide, rerun this tour or load an example board from this button anytime. Enjoy the meeting.

nameGate.why: Add your name so cards and cursors on the board show who's who

guide.title: Shared whiteboard
guide.subtitle: Talk through your meeting — the AI turns the key points into a board
guide.step1Body: Press "● Start recording" at the bottom left and speak normally — pause for a beat and the AI turns that chunk into sticky notes. You can also paste a transcript into the panel and hit "Send to agent".
guide.step2Body: While recording, just say "tidy this up", "show only Alex's", "assign this to Sam" or "make it a decision" — the AI recognises commands and runs them, no buttons needed.
guide.step4Body: Double-click empty space to add a sticky, double-click a card to edit it, drag to move. Click a card to recolour or delete it; "Connect" draws a relationship between two cards.
guide.step5Body: "Share / QR" at the top right — teammates scan the QR code or type the room code and edit with you live.
guide.step6Body: Hit "Export" → Board summary, and the AI writes a one-page record matched to each diagram type.

examples.title: Example boards
examples.subtitle: Load a finished example to see what the AI builds; expand "sample phrases" to speak them yourself and grow your own board.
examples.zhNote: Example boards are written in Chinese (they're content, not UI). Load one to see the layouts — then speak English to build your own.
examples.copyLinkTitle: Copies a link with a fresh room code — anyone who opens it gets this template in a new room
examples.utterances: Sample phrases: say things like this in a meeting and the AI builds this board
examples.communityNote: Templates contributed by the community (<0>contribution guide</0>).
examples.overwriteNote: Loading replaces the current board (you'll be asked first). To keep your work, use "Export → Board file" beforehand.
examples.confirmOverwrite: Loading an example replaces everything on the current board. Continue?
examples.linkCopied: Share link copied — opens this template in a fresh room

board.alreadyHasContent: This room already has content — skipped loading the template

topbar.shareTitle: Share this room: QR code, room code, invite link

menu.install: Install app / Add to home screen

appbar.exportTitle: Export: board summary, Markdown, PNG, restorable board file
appbar.settingsTitle: Settings: cloud/local AI, layout spacing, auto-arrange
appbar.resetViewTitle: Reset view to origin and 100% zoom
appbar.clearTitle: Clear the whole room (wipes the board for everyone — careful)
appbar.examplesTitle: Example boards: load a full demo board + sample phrases

confirm.clearRoom: Clear the whole room for everyone?
confirm.deleteFrame: Delete the diagram "{{title}}"? The {{count}} cards inside it will be deleted too.
confirm.endRoom: End room "{{room}}"? This clears it for everyone.
confirm.importOverwrite: Importing replaces everything on the current board with this file. Continue?

tools.stickyTitle: Add a blank sticky note (or double-click empty canvas)
tools.noteTitle: Add an annotation note. Works on any diagram; auto-arrange and the AI leave it alone.
tools.newFrameTitle: Add a diagram manually (the AI also opens one when the topic changes)
tools.connectTitle: Click two sticky notes in turn to draw a relationship arrow
tools.tidyTitle: Re-arrange every diagram according to its board type
tools.deleteTitle: Delete the selected sticky or connector (Delete)

popover.dictateTitle: Edit this card's text/tags/owner by voice (press again to stop)

typePicker.title: Add a diagram
typePicker.subtitle: A meeting can hold several diagrams. The AI opens a matching one when the topic changes; here you can add one manually and pick its type.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Applies immediately — nothing is hardcoded.
settings.languageNote: AI output (card text, summaries) follows this language too.
settings.adminLocked: Host settings are locked on this deployment (processing mode / speech source / local-only mode are admin-only). "Bring your own AI" and the Groq key below still work — keys stay in your browser and use your own quota.
settings.modeMoriDesc: mori-ear handles speech (it picks local whisper / Groq itself); AI processing uses the shared config.
settings.modeCustomDesc: This app handles everything itself — no mori-ear needed. Pick cloud or local for speech and text separately; custom mode trims silence first (avoids silence hallucinations).
settings.groqKeyDesc: Paste your Groq key (console.groq.com/keys). It stays in this browser only and is sent per request, so AI cards/summaries use your own quota — never shared between visitors.
settings.groqKeyLockedNote: Note: speech-to-text still uses the host's STT settings; your key is not used for transcription.
settings.groqKeyLocalNote: On a single-machine setup the key also syncs to the local server, so cloud transcription works too.
settings.sttLocalDesc: Calls your local whisper-server (/inference). Not installed? Run scripts/setup-whisper-linux.sh (auto-detects GPU/CPU).
settings.sttLocalMissing: ⚠ No local whisper-server detected. Run scripts/setup-whisper-linux.sh, or enter your own URL below.
settings.sttCloudDesc: Uses your own Groq API key for Groq Whisper (zero install).
settings.earDesc: STT is handled by mori-ear; the settings below live in the shared ~/.mori/config.json (shared across the Mori universe — changes affect other tools; mori-ear re-reads it on every transcription, no restart needed).
settings.earModelNote: (small = faster, large-v3-turbo = more accurate; GPU/CPU depends on the whisper-server build, not the model)
settings.autoTidy: Auto-arrange after the AI adds content (off = cards stay put until you press "Arrange")
settings.byoDesc: Fill these in to use your own quota instead of the host's. Any OpenAI-compatible service works (OpenAI / Groq / Gemini / Azure / OpenRouter / local Ollama); all three fields are required — leave blank to use the host default.
settings.byoKeyPlaceholder: API key (stays in your browser, sent per request)
settings.hostLocked: Host settings are locked on this deployment

export.title: Export
export.subtitle: "Board file" fully restores; the rest are snapshots (one-way).
export.boardFileDesc: Saves a .json with every card, connector and diagram — import to restore. You can also send the file to someone else to continue the discussion and send it back.
export.summaryDesc: AI writes a one-page record matched to each diagram type (opens in a new tab)
export.htmlDesc: Downloads an .html — full board snapshot + summary + transcript, opens offline with a double-click
export.mdDesc: Downloads a .md — one section per diagram
export.pngDesc: Exports the full board (including off-screen cards); paper colour follows the current theme
export.copyPngTitle: Puts the whole-board PNG on the clipboard — paste straight into chats or docs

htmlDoc.title: Board record
htmlDoc.noTranscript: (No transcript was recorded for this session)

share.scanHint: Scan the QR code on a phone, or join with the room code
share.joinPlaceholder: Enter a room code to join…
share.roomCountOnly: {{count}} rooms in progress (room codes aren't listed on this site — you need the code to join)
share.copyViewLinkTitle: Anyone opening it can only view: editing UI is hidden and writes are rejected by the server
share.lockTitle: When locked, only you (the room owner) can edit; everyone else is view-only
share.unlockTitle: Unlock so everyone can edit again
share.lockedNote: This board is locked: only the room owner can edit right now
share.viewLinkCopied: View-only link copied — people who open it can look but not edit
share.locked: Locked: everyone else is view-only, only you can edit

panel.title: Meeting recorder
panel.recording: Recording · {{count}} chunks done — tap to stop
panel.recordTitle: Continuous recording: speak and pause — each chunk lands on the board; press again to stop
panel.failedRetryTitle: The audio for these chunks is still here — click to resend
panel.onceTitle: Single take: press to start, speak, press to stop
panel.pastePlaceholder: Paste an existing meeting transcript here and send it below (this box is local to you — not synced)
panel.sendToAgentTitle: Hand this transcript to the AI to sort into colour-coded sticky notes
panel.undoAiTitle: Removes the cards and connectors the AI just added (its edits/deletions of existing cards aren't included)

rec.interrupted: Recording interrupted (the system took back the microphone)
rec.meetingBusy: Recording… speak a chunk, pause, and it lands on the board automatically
rec.noVoice: Can't hear anything — check the system is using the right microphone (some laptops need "Digital Mic")
rec.rateLimited: Demo rate limit — recording continues; resuming uploads in {{wait}}s
rec.segFailed: One chunk didn't send ({{why}}) — press "Resend" to recover it, nothing is lost

mic.blockedShort: Microphone blocked by the browser — needs localhost or HTTPS
mic.blockedMeeting: Microphone blocked by the browser: this page is {{origin}}, but it needs localhost or HTTPS.
mic.blockedRecord: Microphone blocked by the browser: this page is {{origin}} — neither localhost nor HTTPS. On a laptop open http://localhost:5174 instead; on a phone recording needs HTTPS.
mic.denied: Microphone permission denied — click the lock (or mic icon) in the address bar, set it to Allow and try again
mic.notFound: No microphone found — check the system has one and the browser picked the right input device
mic.busy: Microphone is in use by another app — close whatever else is using it and try again

card.speakNow: Say what this card should be… press again to stop

agent.demoThinking: Agent thinking… (turning the demo transcript into a board, ~10–20s)
agent.undoRemoved: Removed the {{count}} cards the AI added last round
agent.undoGone: The cards from the last AI round are no longer on the board

busy.tidied: Re-arranged every diagram by its board type
busy.pngCopied: Board image copied — paste it anywhere
busy.pngCopyUnsupported: This browser can't copy images — use "Download PNG" instead
busy.pngCopyFailed: Copy failed (browser refused) — use "Download PNG" instead
busy.emptyBoardCopy: The board is empty — add a few cards before copying
busy.emptyBoardExport: The board is empty — add a few cards before exporting
busy.importBadJson: Import failed: the file isn't valid JSON
busy.importBadFormat: Import failed: not a mori-canvas board file

conn.disconnected: Offline, reconnecting — don't worry, edits made now sync automatically once you're back
conn.coldStart: Waking the server… (the free demo host sleeps when idle; first connection takes ~30s)

empty.title: Shared whiteboard
empty.line1: Press "● Start recording" at the bottom left and talk — the board builds itself
empty.line2: Or double-click empty space for a sticky · "Share / QR" at the top right brings people in
empty.loadExample: Not sure where to start? Load an example
empty.tryDemo: Try the demo transcript (no mic needed)

demo.transcript: Met with the client today about the online booking system. They're using a paper sign-in sheet and keep getting double bookings, so they want patients to pick their own time slots. We quoted the quarterly plan. The client worries the front desk won't manage the admin panel; I said we'd record tutorial videos. One risk is we need to confirm the clinic network can accept outside connections. Next step: I'll deliver a demo by next Wednesday.

hint.desktop: Double-click empty space to add · double-click a card to edit · drag to move · Delete removes the selected card/connector · Ctrl+Z undo · drag empty space to pan · scroll to zoom

install.iosBody:
In Safari, tap "Share" below
→ scroll to "Add to Home Screen"
→ Add, and you get a full-screen app icon.
